scripts.dev: concurrently -n user,owner,admin -c blue,green,magenta "pnpm --filter user-web dev" "pnpm --filter owner-portal dev" "pnpm --filter admin-panel dev"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n docker,user,owner,admin -c yellow,blue,green,magenta "docker compose up" "pnpm --filter user-web dev" "pnpm --filter owner-portal dev" "pnpm --filter admin-panel dev"
